holdings.infoBox: PWB is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are Applied Materials stock at 4.06%, Lam Research at 3.72%, Micron Technology at 3.70%, Caterpillar at 3.38%, and Visa Inc. at 3.31%.

overview.description: The Invesco Large Cap Growth ETF (PWB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index that uses a multifactor selection methodology to select large-cap stocks with growth characteristics. PWB was launched on Mar 3, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Dynamic Large Cap Growth Intellidex Index (AMEX)
